The '''XX-8''' was a model of [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] emplacement manufactured by [[Taim & Bak/Legends|Taim & Bak]].

==Description==
The XX-8 was the predecessor of the [[XX-9 heavy turbolaser/Legends|XX-9 heavy turbolaser]].
It was similar in design to its successor, though this earlier model featured a taller tower that held both the [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser's]] main [[Turbine/Legends|turbine]] and gunnery crew stations. The XX-9's turbine and crew stations were located within the vessel, not the weapon itself.<ref name="EGWT" />
